pr.title: GolfStudent v2 14L: d=352, Value Residuals, GPTQ-lite, Schedule-Free, Muon+EMA

output.summary: GolfStudent v2 builds a 14-layer d=352 GatedMLP/attention stack with value-residual skips, Muon+EMA training, and a schedule-free final phase before GPTQ-lite quantization.
techniques: Hybrid GatedMLP+attention RoPE layers with weight-tied embeddings
Value residual tanh-gated skip scalars every three blocks
Muon optimizer with momentum warmup+EMA and schedule-free final window
